prompt: Create a warm, cinematic vertical lifestyle photograph of a young adult woman with long dark brown hair sitting sideways on a sunlit kitchen counter in the early morning. She wears an oversized chunky knit beige off-shoulder sweater that slips down one shoulder, with bare legs folded at the edge of the counter, relaxed and slightly playful posture, looking toward the camera; cover her face with a centered opaque beige square censor block. The room is a cozy small kitchen flooded with intense golden backlight from a large window with sheer white curtains behind her, producing soft haze, bloom, rim light around her hair, and visible circular orange lens flares. Use a shallow depth of field, dreamy film-photography texture, warm amber color grading, soft focus highlights, and natural household realism. Include exactly 10 prominent kitchen still-life elements: 1 electric gooseneck kettle near the window, 1 pour-over coffee dripper, 1 glass coffee server beneath it, 1 white coffee cup, 1 sliced loaf of bread on a wooden board, 1 whole bread roll in the foreground, 1 leafy potted herb plant on the counter, 1 leafy green plant near the window, and 2 wall shelves on the right holding glass jars and cups. Keep the composition vertical 2:3, with the woman centered-left, the coffee setup and bread on the right foreground, bright blown-out window background, intimate morning atmosphere, no visible text, no watermark.
